diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation in Paging
diagrams.description: Shows how a virtual address is translated to physical address using page table
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation process in paging systems

diagrams.title: Segmented Memory Organization
diagrams.description: Illustrates how logical memory is divided into segments and mapped to physical memory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding segmentation and segment table lookup

diagrams.title: Page Fault Handling Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process when a page fault occurs
elements: Check valid bit in page table
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete page fault handling mechanism

diagrams.title: TLB and Page Table Interaction
diagrams.description: Shows how TLB and page table work together for address translation
